hero.sub: A financial plan isn't about ending up with the biggest number. It's about your money supporting the life you actually want to live — today and every year going forward.

whoWeServe.heading: We work with people who want their money to mean something.
whoWeServe.body: Whether you're just entering retirement, already there, or still building toward it, the work is the same. We help you turn what you've saved into income you can count on, decisions you feel good about, and a plan that supports your purpose — not someone else's.

covers.label: What We Do
covers.heading: What a plan with us covers
covers.sub: Six pieces, one integrated plan. Each part coordinates with the others because that's what a real plan requires.

cards.title: Liquidity & Cash Flow
cards.desc: Understanding what your money is doing today, and designing future cash flow that supports your life for every year going forward.

cards.title: Protection
cards.desc: Life insurance, disability, long-term care, and the coverage in between. A plan that holds up no matter what life brings.

cards.title: Investments
cards.desc: Portfolios built to support the income your plan needs to produce — not the other way around.

cards.title: Retirement Income
cards.desc: A personalized strategy to turn your savings into a paycheck designed to last a lifetime.

cards.title: Tax-Aware Planning
cards.desc: Most planning decisions carry tax consequences. We weigh them every step of the way so they're built into the plan, not handled after the fact.

cards.title: Legacy
cards.desc: What you leave behind, and to whom, and how. Family, the people you love, the causes that matter to you.

planPreview.label: How We Plan
planPreview.heading: Our planning process starts with you, not your accounts.
planPreview.body: It begins with a free Clarity Call to see if we're the right fit. From there, the work runs through five steps.

steps.title: Clarify Your Vision
steps.desc: What you want this life and this next season to look like.

steps.title: Organize Your Financial Picture
steps.desc: Where you are today, top to bottom.

steps.title: Put the Plan into Motion
steps.desc: Open the accounts, make the moves.

steps.title: Monitor and Adjust as Life Evolves
steps.desc: An advisor who's still paying attention five, ten, twenty years from now.

philosophy.label: Why We Exist
philosophy.quote: Money on its own doesn't mean much. What matters is what it lets you do, who it lets you take care of, and the life it helps you live.
philosophy.body: We started One Life Advisory because we believe a financial plan should start with purpose, not products. One plan. Built around your purpose. Designed to help you live the life you actually want.

finalCta.label: Get Started
finalCta.heading: Ready to build a plan with purpose?
finalCta.sub: The first step is a free Clarity Call. No pressure. No pitch.
